title: Supercharge Your mondaydotcom Boards with Lookup Sync
excerpt: Tired of manually searching for related data across multiple boards? Lookup Sync makes it effortless! This powerful app helps you auto-sync information across connected boards in real-time, keeping everything accurate an…

posts.author: sa07chin (Sachin Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Tired of manually searching for related data across multiple boards? Lookup Sync makes it effortless! This powerful app helps you auto-sync information across connected boards in real-time, keeping everything accurate and up to date.

Key Features:

Auto-Sync Data: Keep fields updated across linked items without manual effort.

Advanced Lookup Fields: Pull in key details from connected boards instantly.

Real-Time Updates: Changes on one board reflect automatically across others.

Error-Free Workflows: Eliminate duplicate entries and outdated information.

Simplify your workflow, reduce manual work, and keep your data 100% reliable with Lookup Sync ! Want to see it in action? Try it now!

Available on Monday.com Apps Marketplace.

#mondayapps #Automation #Productivity

posts.author: arf (Alex R-F)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please consider adding the word “App” or “Add-On” to your post’s title.

It should also be posted in the category "Monday Apps & Developers" (in the ‘Share Your Monday Apps!’ subcategory)—NOT in “Platform discussions”.

As it stands, it’s disingenuous because based on its title and category, it implies ‘Lookup Sync’ is a native Monday feature.
